blocks.content: 12:10 PM. The Lincoln High cafeteria — two hundred people figuring out where they belong.
Center table. Jonathan was already there, sitting like he'd sat there for years. The whole table leaning in.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: They found me. Open seat right there — come on.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: Two spots down from you isn't really sitting with you.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Bro it's the same table. Stop analyzing everything and sit down.
Near the windows, Maya Reeves glanced up from her own table and gave Larry a small nod — the kind that said she'd seen him before people started noticing him standing there.
People were starting to notice him standing there.

options.label: Jonathan's table. That's where you belong.
Head toward Maya. She already knows your name.
Find somewhere quiet. Don't make it a test.
